name: Ovation B-2805FC
comment: Ovation B-2805FC is the first batten style fixture to take advantage of the extended color capabilities of the RGBA-Lime color mixing system. Taking control of all this power is now easier than ever thanks to the incorporation of RDM, Art-Net™ and sACN in addition to standard DMX control. Up to 10 sections can be controlled individually for maximum flexibility, and an easy to access Virtual Color Wheel and Color Temperature Presets can make programming a breeze. An included holographic filter easily locks into place for enhanced wall/cyc grazing ability.
